events.name: West Seattle Community Garage Sale Day
events.description: The biggest ever West Seattle Community Garage Sale Day with approximately 650 registered sales throughout the neighborhood.

events.name: World Migratory Bird Day Celebration
events.description: Learn about avian friends at Seward Park Audubon's World Migratory Bird Day Celebration, featuring educational activities and bird watching.

events.name: Burke-Gilman Frühlingsfest
events.description: The springtime version of Oktoberfest, celebrating the season with German-style beers, lively music, and Bavarian-inspired festivities.

events.name: SIFF 2026 - Seattle International Film Festival
events.description: Opening weekend of SIFF 2026 featuring international films, including 'Holland' by Czech cinema giant Agnieszka Holland.

events.name: Zakir Khan Live
events.description: Renowned Indian comedian, writer, and actor Zakir Khan brings his unique brand of humor to Seattle on his tour.

top_pick.name: West Seattle Community Garage Sale Day
top_pick.description: The biggest ever edition with ~650 registered sales throughout West Seattle. Perfect for treasure hunting and finding unique items while supporting the community.
